headline: Atmos Energy Named in Lake Dallas Home Explosion Lawsuit
summary: DALLAS, March 25, 2026--Lyons & Simmons, LLP, a Texas-based national trial firm, has filed a lawsuit against Atmos Energy Corporation on behalf of Jessica Bailey Lopez who suffered catastrophic injuries following an explosion and ensuing fire that ripped apart her home on the evening of March 19, 2026, leaving her buried alive under what remains of her home.

headline: Is Atmos Energy (ATO) Pricing Look Reasonable After Strong Multi Year Share Price Gains
summary: Investors may be considering whether Atmos Energy at around US$181.57 is offering fair value right now, or if the price has run ahead of what the fundamentals support. The stock has been relatively steady in the short term, with a 2.9% decline over the last 7 days and a 0.3% return over 30 days. Longer term returns of 7.2% year to date, 25.1% over 1 year, 77.6% over 3 years and 108.0% over 5 years provide useful context for any valuation check.
